heading: Recognition and enforcement of foreign arbitral decisions and awards; reciprocity
label: 304 Recognition and enforcement of foreign arbitral decisions and awards; reciprocity
text: Arbitral decisions or awards made in the territory of a foreign State shall, on the basis of reciprocity, be recognized and enforced under this chapter only if that State has ratified or acceded to the Inter-American Convention.
notes: Effective DateSection effective upon the entry into force of the Inter-American Convention on International Commercial Arbitration of , with respect to the United States (), see , set out as a note under .January 30, 1975Oct. 27, 1990section 3 of Pub. L. 101–369section 301 of this title
